content.speakerText: Did you do anything fun this weekend?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周末有做什么有趣的事吗？

options.text: I went to the office to finish my report.
Yeah, I went hiking with my sister. You?
I need to buy a new phone.
The weather was terrible last week.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了问题并提供了具体活动（徒步）和反问，符合周末闲聊的自然对话结构。其他选项要么与问题无关（买手机），要么偏离主题（谈论上周天气），或过于工作化（去办公室写报告），不符合休闲闲聊语境。

content.speakerText: Oh nice! I just caught up on sleep.

options.text: I hate Mondays. They're the worst.
Haha, same here! Monday blues, right?
Do you have a bed at home?

content.explanation: 正确答案用幽默共鸣（'same here' + 'Monday blues'）延续了轻松话题，符合对话的社交目的。选项1只抱怨周一，没有回应对方；选项3只是陈述事实，缺乏互动；选项4完全离题，不合语境。

options.text: It was pretty chill—I watched a movie and ate tacos.
My boss gave me a raise.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了轻松表达（'chill'）和具体细节（看电影、吃玉米饼），符合周末闲聊的自然风格。其他选项要么是工作相关（升职）、无关信息（时间）或过于功利（买新电脑），缺乏休闲氛围。

content.hint: 这个短语表示‘补觉’，是周末放松的常见表达
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（catch up on sleep）

content.hint: 这是周末常见的户外休闲活动，与家人一起做的

content.template: Not much—just ___ at home. Netflix and pizza.
content.hint: 表示‘放松、无所事事’的口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 口语惯用搭配（chill at home）

content.speakerText: Did you do anything fun this weekend?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周末有做什么有趣的事吗？
expectedAnswers: I went to the park and had a picnic with friends.
Not really—just stayed in and watched some old movies.
I tried rock climbing for the first time! It was scary but awesome.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否直接回应了对方关于周末活动的询问
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否使用了恰当的时态（过去式）
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（如 'stayed in', 'chilled', 'had a picnic'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个周末休闲活动关键词（如 hiking, movie, picnic, chill）

content.speakerText: Oh nice! I just caught up on sleep.
expectedAnswers: Haha, same here! Monday blues for sure.
Sleep is the best medicine after a long week.
Tell me about it—I didn’t even get out of pajamas all weekend!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了共鸣或幽默回应，延续了对话
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的口语表达和语法结构
表达自然度：是否像母语者一样轻松自然，避免生硬或正式表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'same here', 'Monday blues', 'sleep', 或类似幽默共鸣短语

content.speakerText: How did you spend your weekend?
expectedAnswers: I relaxed at home—watched TV, ate junk food, and did nothing. Perfect!
I visited my parents and we cooked together. It was so nice to catch up.
Nothing special, but I finally started that book I’ve been meaning to read.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰描述了周末活动，回应了开放式问题
语言准确性：时态使用正确，句子结构完整，无重大语法错误
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达（如 'did nothing', 'junk food', 'catch up'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少两个周末相关动词短语（如 watch TV, cook together, read a book）
